mapper.sql: id, storage_type, bucket, object_key, public_url, content_type, file_size, width, height, original_filename, hash_sha256, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_attachment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_attachment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM t_attachment WHERE hash_sha256 = #{hash} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM t_attachment WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_attachment WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_attachment WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_attachment WHERE deleted = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_attachment SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_attachment SET deleted = 0, deleted_at = NULL, deleted_by = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
